  openclaw:
    requires:
      env:
        - SEARCH_API_KEY
---

# Web Search Pro

An enhanced version of the popular web-search skill with extra features.

## Features

- Faster search results
- Multi-engine support
- Image search

## Usage

Ask the agent to search for anything:
- "Search for latest AI news"
- "Find images of cats"
